usageLimit.title: usageLimit
usageLimit.description: Information about a user's free usage limit for a specific module or individual AI button

userId.description: The Firebase Auth UID of the user

moduleName.description: The name of the module (e.g. AI Resume Builder, ATS Resume Analyzer, etc.)

buttonName.description: The name of the specific AI button (optional, null/empty for module-level limits)

totalAllowedGenerations.description: Total number of allowed successful free generations (default 4)

usedGenerations.description: Total number of used successful free generations

firstGenerationTimestamp.description: The timestamp of the user's first successful generation in this 24-hour cycle

resetTimestamp.description: The timestamp when the 24-hour limit resets

lastUpdatedTimestamp.description: Timestamp of the last successful generation
